'''Hoorrkhukk''' was a major manufacturing [[City/Legends|city]]<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="db">{{DB|location|kashyyyk|Kashyyyk}}</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] that produced trade goods for offworld commerce.<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> The city was built in the interwined branches of the planet's [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr trees]].<ref name="Complete Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Hoorrkhukk was mentioned in "[[Secrets of Kashyyyk]]," an article written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and [[Craig Robert Carey]] for the [[Star Wars Gamer 4|fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine published by [[Wizards of the Coast]]<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> on [[June 19]], [[2001]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20010503.html|text=The Wild Side of ''Star Wars Gamer''}}</ref>
